summary_sections.title: Lesson Overview
summary_sections.content_html:
Overview

This lesson covers the fundamental measures of center used to analyze and summarize data sets. You'll learn how to calculate and apply the mean, median, and mode, and understand when each is most appropriate.

summary_sections.title: Definitions and Concepts
summary_sections.content_html:
Key Definitions

What is a point in geometry?

It represents a location in space with no size, no width, no length, and no depth. Point A Point is the most basic building block of geometry. The other options — 'A flat surface extending infinitely', 'A straight path with two endpoints', and 'A measurement of distance' — are related concepts but do not correctly answer this specific question.
